title: 10 best herbal capsules for chronic hepatitis

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain silymarin, a flavonoid compound that has been shown to have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Silymarin is able to repair damaged liver cells and promote the regeneration of healthy tissue, which can help to reduce inflammation and scarring caused by chronic hepatitis. Additionally, silymarin is able to block the absorption of toxins into the bloodstream, allowing the liver to function more effectively and reducing the severity of symptoms associated with the condition.
remedy_properties: Silymarin: Silymarin, a flavonoid compound found in milk thistle, has been shown to protect liver cells from damage caused by free radicals and toxins, which can reduce inflammation and scarring associated with chronic hepatitis.

Antioxidant activity: Milk thistle's antioxidant properties help to neutralize harmful oxidative stress in the liver, which can contribute to liver damage and disease progression in cases of chronic hepatitis.

Anti-inflammatory activity: The anti-inflammatory effects of milk thistle have been shown to reduce liver inflammation and fibrosis (scarring) associated with chronic hepatitis, which can improve liver function and overall health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has been shown to protect liver cells from damage and promote healing.
Seeds: High in fatty acids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce liver inflammation and scarring.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality silybum marianum seeds and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 30 seconds.
Combine the powdered silybum marianum with 500mg of silica gel in a small bowl for 15 minutes.
Mix the herbal blend with 250ml of distilled water in a saucepan over low heat for 10 minutes.
Filter the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a glass bottle and discard the solids after 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the filtered liquid extract and store them in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain a unique blend of bioactive compounds that have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The root of the dandelion plant is particularly rich in flavonoids, triterpenoid saponins, and other beneficial compounds that may help reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress associated with chronic hepatitis. By supporting liver function and promoting detoxification, dandelion capsules can potentially alleviate symptoms and slow disease progression, making them a valuable complementary therapy for individuals suffering from this condition.
remedy_properties: Choleretic activity: Dandelion capsule's bitter compounds stimulate the liver to increase bile production, which can help alleviate symptoms of hepatitis such as jaundice and pruritus (itching).

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids and phenolic acids present in dandelion capsules have been shown to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the liver, which can contribute to chronic hepatitis progression.

Liver-protective effects: Dandelion's sesquiterpenes and taraxasterol have been found to exhibit hepatoprotective activity by reducing liver damage and promoting regeneration of liver cells, potentially mitigating fibrosis and cirrhosis associated with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain a wealth of bioactive compounds, including taraxasterol and taraxeryl acetate, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties and help reduce liver damage in chronic hepatitis patients.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the dandelion plant contain a higher concentration of bioactive compounds than the roots, making them an ideal choice for medicinal capsules aimed at treating chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried taraxacum officinale flowers and leaves.
Dry the herb in a warm, dry place for at least two weeks.
Grind the dried herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 500mg of dandelion powder with 100mg of other herbs as desired and fill capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container away from light and moisture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yellow gentian capsules help with chronic hepatitis because they contain a potent anti-inflammatory compound called amarogentin, which has been shown to reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress. The capsule's bioactive compounds also have immunomodulatory effects, helping to regulate the immune system's response to the virus and reducing damage to liver cells. Additionally, yellow gentian capsules have been found to improve liver function and promote regeneration of damaged tissue, making them a valuable natural adjunct therapy for managing chronic hepatitis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yellow gentian's anti-inflammatory property helps to reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress associated with chronic hepatitis, thus mitigating damage and promoting healing.

Antiviral: The antiviral properties of yellow gentian capsules can help inhibit the replication of hepatitis viruses, reducing their ability to cause further liver damage and slowing disease progression.

Bile duct stimulant: Yellow gentian's bile duct-stimulating property can help improve liver function by increasing bile flow and reducing blockages in the bile ducts, which is particularly important for people with chronic hepatitis who may experience bile duct obstruction.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the yellow gentian plant contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress in patients with chronic hepatitis.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the yellow gentian plant are rich in sesquiterpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-hepatitis activity by inhibiting viral replication and reducing liver fibrosis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried gentiana lutea roots in october or november when the plant is mature.
Grind 20g of dried gentiana lutea roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 10g of ground gentiana lutea roots with 100ml of 95% ethanol for 1 hour.
Filter the mixture through cheesecloth and discard the solids, then add 50ml of water to dilute solution.
Fill hard gelatin capsules with a dosage of 300mg each containing 20% gentiana lutea root extract powder.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tree turmeric capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that has been shown to reduce liver inflammation and damage. Curcumin has also been found to inhibit the growth of viruses associated with hepatitis, such as HBV and HCV. Additionally, it has antioxidant properties that help protect the liver cells from further damage, promoting overall liver health and function. By reducing inflammation and viral replication, turmeric capsules can help manage symptoms of chronic hepatitis, including fatigue, joint pain, and digestive issues.
remedy_properties: Curcuminoids: Turmeric's active compound, curcuminoids, have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce liver inflammation and scarring associated with chronic hepatitis.

Cyclooxygenase (COX) inhibition: Curcumin in turmeric capsules inhibits the activity of COX enzymes, which are involved in the production of pro-inflammatory prostaglandins, thereby reducing liver inflammation and improving symptoms of chronic hepatitis.

Immunomodulatory effects: Turmeric's bioactive compounds have been shown to modulate the immune response, helping to reduce the severity of chronic hepatitis by regulating the activity of immune cells and reducing oxidative stress in the liver.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: These underground stems have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing liver inflammation and oxidative stress associated with chronic hepatitis.
Roots: The roots of the turmeric plant contain a high concentration of curcuminoids, which have been shown to possess potent anti-hepatitis activity and improve liver function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh berberis aristata roots in autumn season with clean scissors.
Wash the harvested roots thoroughly under running water and dry them completely.
Dry the cleaned roots using sun drying method for 7-10 days or air drying for 30 days.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar pestle for 1-2 minutes.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with a mixture of 500mg powdered berberis aristata and 250mg turmeric powder in a ratio of 2:1, sealing immediately after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Phyllanthus capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain standardized extracts of Phyllanthus amarus, a herb known for its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. These compounds have been shown to inhibit the replication of the hepatitis B virus, reducing inflammation and liver damage associated with chronic hepatitis. Additionally, Phyllanthus has been found to stimulate the production of glutathione, a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the liver from further harm.
remedy_properties: Antiviral properties: Phyllanthus extracts have been shown to inhibit the replication of the hepatitis B virus (HBV), which can help reduce viral load and prevent liver damage.
Immunomodulatory effects: Phyllanthus has been found to modulate the immune response, enhancing the production of cytokines that fight HBV infection and reducing inflammation in the liver.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidant compounds present in Phyllanthus capsules help neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress in the liver, which can contribute to chronic hepatitis and its complications.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Phyllanthus plants contain alkaloids and phenolic compounds that have been shown to have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in treating liver diseases like chronic hepatitis.

Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are underground stems that store nutrients and bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenes, which have been found to exhibit antiviral and immunomodulatory effects, useful in combating chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried phyllanthus amarus leaves and stems in sufficient quantity for processing.
Grind the dried plant material into fine powder using mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powdered plant material with 5% gelatin in a ratio of 1:1 by weight and incubate at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Fill the gelatin mixture into empty capsules and seal tightly to ensure freshness and sterility.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place protected from light for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. This compound has been shown to reduce liver inflammation and scarring, which are common symptoms of chronic hepatitis. Additionally, licorice capsules have been found to improve liver function by increasing the production of glutathione, an antioxidant that helps protect the liver from further damage. By reducing inflammation and improving liver function, licorice capsules can help alleviate symptoms of chronic hepatitis and promote overall liver health.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Helps reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the liver, which can contribute to liver damage and progression of chronic hepatitis.
Flavonoids: Antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can cause liver cell damage and fibrosis (scarring) in chronic hepatitis patients.
Saponins: Soothe and protect the liver cells from damage caused by oxidative stress, inflammation, and toxins, which can help reduce liver damage and improve overall liver function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties and helps reduce liver damage caused by chronic hepatitis.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the licorice plant are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to protect the liver from oxidative stress and inflammation associated with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 20 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root powder and set it aside for processing.
Combine the dried powder with 40 milliliters of distilled water in a heat-resistant mixing bowl and let it steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into another container, squeezing out as much liquid as possible from the solids.
Bring the resulting decoction to a boil in a saucepan, then reduce heat and simmer for an additional 20 minutes to concentrate the extract.
Fill 100- capsule gelatin capsules with the cooled licorice extract solution at a dose of 500 milligrams per capsule and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because it has been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce liver inflammation and damage caused by the disease. The herb's immunomodulatory effects can also enhance immune function, allowing the body to fight off the viral infection that causes chronic hepatitis more effectively. Additionally, ginseng capsules may help improve overall liver health and function, reducing fatigue and improving quality of life for individuals with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginseng capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation in the liver, which can alleviate symptoms of chronic hepatitis such as fatigue and joint pain.

Immune system modulation: Ginseng has been shown to modulate the immune system by increasing the production of cytokines that help fight off viral infections, which is particularly important for chronic hepatitis patients who may have a weakened immune response.

Antioxidant properties: Ginseng capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals in the body, which can reduce oxidative stress and damage to liver cells, ultimately helping to slow down the progression of chronic hepatitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, including saponins and polysaccharides, which have been shown to inhibit viral replication and modulate immune responses.
Rhyzomes: Containing a unique combination of bioflavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce liver damage.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh panax ginseng roots weighing 200 grams, ensuring they are free from contaminants.
Cleanse the harvested roots by rinsing them thoroughly under running water and pat drying with paper towels.
Dry the cleaned roots using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours or air dry them for 7 days.
Grind dried panax ginseng roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder, achieving a consistency of 100 mesh size.
Fill hard-shell gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the powdered ginseng and seal securely to maintain potency during storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: King of bitters capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because it is a powerful blend of herbs that works to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the liver, thereby alleviating symptoms such as fatigue, nausea, and abdominal pain. The capsules contain a unique combination of bitter compounds that stimulate digestive enzymes and improve nutrient absorption, which can help to repair damaged liver tissue and promote overall liver health. Additionally, the herbal formula has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to reduce scarring and fibrosis in the liver.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in the capsules help protect liver cells from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, thereby reducing inflammation and promoting liver health.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in the capsules reduce inflammation and swelling in the liver, which can help alleviate symptoms of chronic hepatitis such as pain and discomfort.

Immune-modulating properties: The immunomodulatory effects of the capsules help regulate the immune response to viral infections, such as those caused by HBV or HCV, and promote a balanced immune system.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to reduce liver inflammation and fibrosis, making them a key component in treating chronic hepatitis.
Rhyzomes: Containing bioflavonoids and other polyphenols that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help protect the liver from damage caused by chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Source high-quality andrographis paniculata leaves from a trusted supplier ensuring freshness and potency.
Dry the leaves in a well-ventilated area or using a dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours to preserve bioactive compounds.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to increase surface area.
Mix one part of the powdered andrographis paniculata with three parts of gelatin in a small bowl and add purified water to form a homogeneous paste.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with 250-500 mg of the herbal mixture and seal immediately to preserve potency for up to two years when stored properly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Curcumin, a key compound in turmeric, has been shown to reduce liver inflammation and fibrosis, two hallmark features of chronic hepatitis. Additionally, curcumin's ability to modulate immune response and scavenge free radicals can help prevent further liver damage and promote healing. By reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, turmeric capsules may alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, abdominal pain, and yellowing of the skin and eyes commonly associated with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: Curcumin, a polyphenolic compound found in turmeric, has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce liver inflammation and scarring associated with chronic hepatitis.

Antioxidant activity: Turmeric's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that damage liver cells, reducing oxidative stress and improving overall liver function in patients with chronic hepatitis.

Anti-fibrotic activity: Curcumin has been shown to inhibit the formation of fibrous tissue that can lead to liver cirrhosis and scarring, helping to slow down disease progression and improve liver function.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are the primary source of curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that helps reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in liver tissue, making them effective for treating chronic hepatitis.

Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the underground stems of turmeric, which contain high levels of curcuminoids and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to reduce liver damage and improve liver function in patients with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality turmeric rhizomes from a trusted source and wash them thoroughly under cold running water.
Dry the washed turmeric rhizomes in a warm dry place for at least 7 days to reduce moisture content.
Grind 500g of dried turmeric into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice grinder for approximately 5 minutes.
Mix 1 tablespoon of ground turmeric with 2 tablespoons of gelatin and 1 tablespoon of glycerin in a small bowl to create a capsule filling.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the prepared mixture using a capsule filler machine or a spoon for approximately 30 seconds.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chicory capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain inulin, a prebiotic fiber that promotes the growth of beneficial gut bacteria. These good bacteria help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the liver, which are common symptoms of chronic hepatitis. Additionally, chicory capsules have been shown to improve liver function by increasing the production of glutathione, a powerful antioxidant that helps to protect the liver from damage. As a result, chicory capsules may be a useful adjunctive therapy for individuals with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Chicory contains antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the liver, which can contribute to chronic hepatitis symptoms such as fatigue, joint pain, and loss of appetite.

Hepatoprotective properties: Chicory's saponins have been shown to protect liver cells from damage caused by free radicals, toxins, and other environmental factors, which may help prevent further liver damage in cases of chronic hepatitis.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Chicory's flavonoids and phenolic acids exhibit anti-inflammatory activity, which can help reduce inflammation and fibrosis (scarring) in the liver, common complications of chronic hepatitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce liver damage and inflammation associated with chronic hepatitis.
Rhyzomes: Containing sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, rhyzomes have been shown to exhibit immunomodulatory effects, helping to regulate the immune response and alleviate symptoms of chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest cichorium intybus roots and clean them thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the cleaned roots in a low-temperature oven at 60°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part of the powdered chicory root with two parts of gelatin and fill capsules using a capsule machine.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herb has been traditionally used to soothe and calm the liver, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can exacerbate hepatitis symptoms. By regulating liver function and promoting healthy bile flow, chamomile capsules may help alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, joint pain, and digestive issues commonly associated with chronic hepatitis. Additionally, its calming effects can also help reduce anxiety and improve overall well-being in individuals with chronic hepatitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as apigenin and luteolin, help reduce liver inflammation and damage associated with chronic hepatitis, which can slow down disease progression.

Antioxidant property: The antioxidant properties of chamomile capsules neutralize free radicals that contribute to oxidative stress, a condition often seen in chronic hepatitis patients, which helps protect the liver from further damage.

Cytoprotective property: Chamomile's cytoprotective effects help preserve the integrity of liver cells and tissues, reducing the risk of fibrosis (scarring) and cirrhosis, common complications of chronic hepatitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of chamomile are rich in apigenin, a flavonoid that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in reducing liver inflammation and oxidative stress associated with chronic hepatitis.

Flowers: Chamomile flowers contain significant amounts of azulene, a sesquiterpene lactone that has been demonstrated to exhibit hepatoprotective effects by reducing liver damage and improving liver function in cases of chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh matricaria chamomilla flowers and dry them thoroughly in a warm oven at 40°c for 2 hours.
Grind 30g of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered matricaria chamomilla with 100ml of pure vegetable oil in a clean glass jar and store it at room temperature for 2 weeks.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter to separate the herbal extract from the oil and discard the solids.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500mg of the herbal extract and store them in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain bioactive compounds that have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, have been shown to reduce liver inflammation and fibrosis, two key features of chronic hepatitis. Additionally, ginger has been found to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and increase the expression of antioxidant enzymes, which helps to protect the liver from further damage and promote its natural healing processes. remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Herbal ginger capsules contain compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have potent anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce liver inflammation and damage caused by chronic hepatitis.

Antioxidant property: Ginger has antioxidant properties that can help neutralize free radicals and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to liver disease progression and fibrosis (scarring) in chronic hepatitis patients.

Immune-modulatory property: Herbal ginger capsules may modulate the immune system's response to hepatitis infections, reducing inflammation and promoting healing by inhibiting pro-inflammatory cytokines and enhancing antioxidant defenses.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress associated with chronic hepatitis.
Roots: Contain bioactive compounds like sesquiterpenes, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, aiding in the management of liver fibrosis and scarring caused by chronic hepatitis.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality zingiber officinale rhizomes weighing 250 grams for drying.
Dry the rhizomes in a warm oven at 60°c for 3 hours to reduce moisture content.
Grind 150 grams of dried zingiber officinale into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered ginger with 50 grams of silicon dioxide and fill gelatin capsules with a mixture of 750 milligrams of ginger powder and 250 milligrams of filler.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container for up to 6 months at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The capsules contain compounds like alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the liver, thereby alleviating symptoms of chronic hepatitis such as fatigue, nausea, and jaundice. Additionally, Asiatic pennywort has been shown to stimulate liver function and improve bile flow, which can help to eliminate toxins from the body and promote overall liver health.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh centella asiatica leaves and dry them properly using shade drying or freeze-drying methods within 24 hours.
Grind the dried centella asiatica leaves into fine powder using a grinder or mortar and pestle to obtain 500 grams of powder.
Mix the powdered centella asiatica with 1000 milliliters of glycerin and 200 milliliters of distilled water in a large bowl to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty capsules with one gram each of the herbal blend using an automated capsule filler or manual filling process, yielding 500 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in airtight containers made of glass or plastic materials at room temperature for up to six months without refrigeration.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Broad-leaved lime capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain a unique combination of bioactive compounds that have been shown to possess potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, have been found to modulate the immune response, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the liver. This can help alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, abdominal pain, and jaundice associated with chronic hepatitis, while also promoting liver cell regeneration and protecting against further damage.

remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality tilia platyphyllos leaves and stems in early summer for optimal potency.
Dry the plant material using a food dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours to preserve active compounds.
Grind dried tilia platyphyllos into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, yielding 1:1 ratio of leaf to stem.
Mix 500mg of ground tilia platyphyllos with 250mg of carrier herb such as licorice root and fill empty capsules with the blend.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months, allowing for easy dosing twice daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herb has been traditionally used to soothe liver irritations and improve digestion, which is often compromised in individuals with chronic hepatitis. Anti-inflammatory effects: Lemon balm contains flavonoids and terpenes that have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce liver inflammation and oxidative stress associated with chronic hepatitis.

remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality melissa officinalis leaves at dawn and clean them thoroughly by rinsing with filtered water.
Dry the cleaned leaves in a warm air circulation oven set at 40°c for 24 hours or until they reach a moisture level of 10%.
Grind the dried melissa officinalis leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, yielding 250 grams.
Mix 500 milligrams of the powdered melissa officinalis with 1000 milligrams of silicon dioxide and fill #00 capsules, creating 120 capsules in total.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 12 months or refrigerate for up to 24 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hawthorn capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds that have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce liver inflammation, oxidative stress, and fibrosis, which are common hallmarks of chronic hepatitis. Barks: Contain flavonoids and procyanidins that have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in treating liver damage.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality crataegus monogyna leaves and stems, drying them thoroughly in a warm air circulation dryer for two hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part of the powdered plant material with one part of vegetable filler such as potato starch or arrowroot powder and one part of gelatin capsules.
Fill each gelatin capsule with 500 milligrams of the prepared herbal mixture, sealing them tightly to prevent contamination.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container kept in a cool dark place for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Knotweed capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because it contains high levels of saponins, which have been shown to have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, rhyzomes are effective in reducing inflammation and improving liver function.
Roots: High in saponins, roots have been traditionally used to treat liver diseases, including chronic hepatitis, due to their ability to reduce liver damage.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh polygonum aviculare leaves and stems, drying them in the shade for at least two days to reduce moisture levels.
Grind 30 grams of dried polygonum aviculare into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered herb with 100 grams of silica gel and 20 grams of lactose, blending until well combined and free-flowing.
Fill empty hard-shell capsules with the blended mixture, using 500 milligrams per capsule for optimal dosing.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, allowing them to be taken as needed or according to the recommended daily dose of two capsules twice daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tea capsules helps with chronic hepatitis because they contain natural compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce liver inflammation and scarring. These herbal teas, such as Milk Thistle and Dandelion, have been traditionally used to support liver health and improve digestion. By taking these tea capsules regularly, individuals with chronic hepatitis may experience relief from symptoms such as fatigue, joint pain, and digestive issues, allowing them to manage their condition more effectively.
remedy_properties: Antioxidants: Herbal tea capsules rich in antioxidants, such as green tea, turmeric, and milk thistle, can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation caused by chronic liver disease, thus slowing down its progression.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Capsules containing herbs like ginger, cumin, and dandelion have anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate symptoms of chronic hepatitis, such as pain and swelling in the liver and abdominal area.

Immune-modulating agents: Herbal tea capsules featuring ingredients like Echinacea, Ashwagandha, and Licorice root can stimulate the immune system to fight off infections and reduce liver inflammation caused by chronic hepatitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Tea roots contain saponins and polysaccharides, which have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, making them effective in treating liver inflammation and fibrosis associated with chronic hepatitis.
Barks: Tea bark contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, helping to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the liver.
remedy_recipe: Harvest camellia sinensis leaves at dawn when dew is still present for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm place protected from direct sunlight and moisture.
Grind 20 grams of dried camellia sinensis leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground camellia sinensis powder with 10 grams of glycyrrhizae root powder and fill gelatin capsules with the mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to six months or freeze them for longer preservation.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for chronic hepatitis are a natural supplement used to alleviate symptoms and promote healing in individuals living with chronic liver disease. These capsules typically contain a blend of herbal extracts, such as milk thistle, turmeric, and silymarin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce liver inflammation and scarring. Examples of herbal capsules that may be beneficial for chronic hepatitis include HepaPro, LivGuard, and Milk Thistle Plus. By taking these supplements, individuals with chronic hepatitis may experience improved liver function, reduced fatigue, and enhanced overall quality of life.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat chronic hepatitis with herbal capsules is to consult with a healthcare professional who has expertise in botanical medicine. supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to chronic hepatitis that are treated with herbal capsules are liver disorders such as fatty liver disease, cirrhosis, and liver fibrosis.
